chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-2386 of 2024. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA No.16915 of 2025. 2. For orders on office objections 3. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2025 Mr. Aslam Kumbha, Advocate for the Petitioner. It appears that the Petitioners have directly approached this Court without first approaching the official respondents for redressal of their grievance. On 23.04.2024, counsel for the Petitioners was directed to file documentary evidence, but compliance of the order has not been made nor any explanation has been furnished for not approaching the official respondents at the first instance. Petition being misconceived is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq PS/
